title: Immutable official-source capture and versioning (exact HTML/PDF bytes, content-addressable never-overwrite storage, byte-level change detection; NO parsing/rendering/OCR/extraction)
objective: M3 chain (D-002 consolidation; carried from PR #93; backlog, sequential). TRUE IMMUTABLE-CAPTURE packet (owner directive 2026-07-23 sec.17.16 decision: ALL PDF parsing/rendering lives in M3-T003; T002 has NO parser/renderer and NO forward dependency on T003). T002 owns ONLY: exact original HTML/PDF bytes; raw SHA-256; content-addressable, deduplicated, never-overwrite object storage exposed as a GENERIC APPEND-ONLY storage interface downstream tasks may use WITHOUT modifying T002; canonical URL, publisher, authority tier, retrieval timestamp, HTTP status + response metadata; transport-level MIME/file-signature checks; and MULTI-SIGNAL version/change detection using RAW source hashes (byte-level), Last-Amended values, the /recently-adopted amendment feed, newly adopted instruments, and official-PDF changes detected by RAW PDF hash. An unchanged homepage banner NEVER suppresses a detected change; the banner is only one signal. NO PDF page count, rotation/crop/media box/DPI, parser-derived or normalized-layout hashes, page rendering, page-image derivatives/hashes, or any parser-dependent inspection occur here  -  those are M3-T003. T002 security is CAPTURE-TIME ONLY: approved hosts + redirect policy, byte/time limits, MIME/file-signature checking, safe filenames/paths, no execution, private/quarantined storage (parser-level security is M3-T003). Store bulk raw HTML/PDF content-addressably in approved cloud object storage; dedupe by hash; never overwrite a prior version; NEVER commit a citywide corpus or leave bulk temp data on the owner PC. T002 is INDEPENDENTLY ACCEPTABLE once durable original HTML/PDF captures, raw hashes, manifests, and version-detection evidence exist  -  it has no forward dependency on T003. FIXTURE-vs-PRODUCTION: fixture/harness increments may be gate-reviewed while B-001 blocks durable storage, but the task is NOT accepted, does NOT mark the ZR domain 'implemented', and does NOT satisfy downstream deps until durable original captures exist (enforced by B-001). Live-source smoke tests are SEPARATE from deterministic CI. Full spec: project-control/reports/M3-CORPUS-REPLAN-PROPOSAL.md sec.17.
business_reason: An immutable, hash-addressed, versioned capture of the exact official BYTES is the provenance floor every downstream stage inherits. Keeping T002 free of any parser/renderer removes the dependency inversion (T002 no longer needs a T003-selected library to be accepted) and keeps the trust boundary clean: nothing here interprets a document, so no parse/render choice can taint provenance. | D-002 M3 chain; carried from PR #93 (superseded).
inputs: M3-T001 accepted: SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md (tier assignment), LEGAL_CORPUS_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md, legal_source_manifest schema (record shape), DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY.md (capture = 'raw_captured', not extraction), authoritative status vocabulary

docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md section 8  -  ZR portal: HTML tree, /recently-adopted feed, /zr-downloads dated PDFs, per-article/chapter PDFs; API surface ABSENT; homepage banner; per-section Last Amended; 504 on the oversized 12-10 node (low-rate, resumable)
services/api/app/resilience/transport.py (M2-T011)  -  bounded HTTP, Retry-After, breaker, budget: REUSE, do not fork
services/api/app/_zr_snapshots/v1/*.snapshot.json + sync_zr_snapshots  -  interim hand-captured pattern this immutable capture supersedes/backfills
B-001 (Supabase management token)  -  gates durable cloud object storage AND this task's acceptance; if unavailable, bounded-fixtures-only engineering path applies
outputs: services/api/app/corpus/ingest/**  -  fetcher over app.resilience.transport, retrieval-metadata recorder, raw HTML/PDF byte capture, capture-time MIME/file-signature + host/redirect + byte/time-limit controls (OWNED)

services/api/app/corpus/storage/**  -  content-addressable object-storage adapter (raw SHA-256 keys, dedupe-by-hash, never-overwrite, private/quarantined buckets) exposing a GENERIC APPEND-ONLY storage interface (put-if-absent + manifest append) that M3-T003/T005 call to append their own derivatives WITHOUT editing T002; legal_source_manifest writer for originals (OWNED)

services/api/app/corpus/versioning/**  -  multi-signal byte-level change detector (raw HTML hash + raw PDF hash + Last-Amended + amendment feed + adopted instrument), candidate-version/reconciliation emitter (OWNED)
services/api/tests/corpus/ingest/**, services/api/tests/corpus/storage/**, services/api/tests/corpus/versioning/**  -  deterministic capture + versioning tests on frozen fixtures
services/api/tests/fixtures/corpus/capture/**  -  bounded frozen official HTML/PDF byte fixtures (NOT a citywide corpus)
infra/ingestion/**  -  Render worker/cron descriptor (only exercised when durable storage is available)
forbidden_paths: services/api/app/corpus/extractors/**, document_validation/**, evidence/** (owned by M3-T003), closure/** (owned by M3-T004), construction_code/** and overlay/** (owned by M3-T005)  -  M3-T002 must not create or modify those trees

ANY PDF parsing/rendering: no page count, rotation/crop/media box/DPI, parser-derived or normalized-layout hashes, page rendering, page-image derivatives/hashes, or parser-dependent inspection (all M3-T003)
ANY semantic OCR/extraction/critical-token/classification; choosing or installing a PDF/OCR/parser library (that decision is M3-T003 /dependency-security)
Adding requests / browser automation / scraping framework / AI framework; importing httpx in production (dev/test-only)

Committing bulk/citywide raw HTML/PDF corpus into git; leaving bulk temp data on the owner PC; fetching live inside a per-property analysis path; overwriting a prior version; marking the ZR domain 'implemented' on fixtures alone
Any rule publication/Verified labeling; editing canonical contracts; apps/web/**; project-control/** except own reports; .claude/** except own agent-memory
acceptance_preconditions: ACCEPTANCE (not gate-PASS) additionally requires: B-001 resolved; durable content-addressed original HTML/PDF captures + raw hashes + manifests exist in approved object storage; multi-signal byte-level version-detection evidence recorded against those durable captures. NO acceptance requirement depends on M3-T003 or any library selected by M3-T003.

Until then, fixture/harness increments may PASS G0-G5 as an engineering increment but the task stays awaiting_gate/blocked (B-001), is NOT accepted, does NOT mark the ZR domain 'implemented', and does NOT satisfy M3-T003/M3-T004 dependencies.
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 immutable byte capture: a frozen fixture source is captured with publisher/tier, canonical URL, retrieval timestamp, HTTP status + response metadata, and raw SHA-256 of the exact original bytes; NO parser-derived field (page count, rotation, DPI, normalized hash) is produced.
AS-2 exact-bytes hash: stored raw bytes reproduce their recorded SHA-256; a single changed byte fails.
AS-3 content-addressable + never-overwrite: identical bytes deduplicate to one object; a changed capture creates a NEW version keyed by its raw hash; a prior version is never overwritten or deleted.

AS-4 append-only interface: the storage interface exposes put-if-absent + manifest-append so a downstream task (M3-T003/T005) can append derivative objects WITHOUT modifying T002 code or overwriting existing objects; a test exercises an append by a simulated downstream caller.

AS-5 multi-signal byte-level versioning: a changed raw HTML hash OR raw PDF hash OR Last-Amended OR amendment-feed entry OR adopted instrument raises a candidate corpus version even with an UNCHANGED homepage banner; an unchanged banner never suppresses a detected change; no parser is used to detect any of these.

AS-6 fail-closed transport + capture-time security: redirect / unexpected host / disallowed MIME or file signature / byte-or-time-limit exceedance fails closed via app.resilience.transport + capture controls (no partial silent capture; no execution; safe filenames/paths; private/quarantined storage).
AS-7 no parsing/extraction here: a test asserts M3-T002 emits NO parsed/rendered/extracted output  -  only raw bytes, raw hashes, capture metadata, manifests, and byte-level version signals.
AS-8 CI isolation: deterministic CI runs on frozen fixtures; live-source smoke tests are a separate suite and do not gate normal builds.
AS-9 fixture-not-production: with B-001 open, a machine/report check confirms the ZR domain is NOT 'implemented', the task is NOT accepted, and downstream deps are NOT satisfied.
NC-1 no live-in-request: no per-property code path triggers a live fetch.
NC-2 storage honesty: with B-001 open, only bounded fixtures are captured and the report states the durable-storage limitation; no bulk corpus committed or left on the PC.

NC-3 untrusted bytes at capture time: a malformed/oversized fixture is rejected by the capture-time byte/time/MIME/signature limits and never executed or written outside private/quarantined storage (parser-level malicious-PDF handling is M3-T003's G5).
risks: Backlog, sequential (D-002 consolidation); not first-wave. Producer dispatched only after its accepted dependencies.

NO FORWARD DEPENDENCY ON T003: T002 is independently acceptable on durable original captures + hashes + version-detection evidence; it uses no parser/renderer and no T003-selected library. The former dependency inversion is removed.

FIXTURE != PRODUCTION: gate PASS on fixtures is an engineering increment; acceptance (and satisfying downstream deps, and 'implemented') requires durable original captures  -  enforced by B-001 in blockers[].
TRUST BOUNDARY: T002 captures bytes, it does not interpret them; ALL parsing/rendering/OCR/extraction and their dependencies belong to M3-T003.

CAPTURE-TIME SECURITY ONLY: approved hosts/redirects, byte/time limits, MIME/file-signature, safe filenames/paths, no execution, private/quarantined storage; parser-level malicious-PDF defenses are M3-T003 G5. Build these as part of ONE shared, domain-agnostic untrusted-document security surface reusable by the future survey-document domain (report sec.17.13); domain eligibility policies stay separate.
THIN CLIENT: no bulk corpus in git or on the owner PC; bulk storage on cloud object storage via a Render worker.
requirement_refs: project-control/reports/M3-CORPUS-REPLAN-PROPOSAL.md  -  full spec (owner directive 2026-07-23 five-packet split + sec.17.16 final decision: all PDF parsing/rendering in M3-T003)
harness_assignments: IMMUTABLE-CAPTURE + BYTE-LEVEL VERSION-CHANGE-DETECTION HARNESS: exact-bytes hash reproduces / changed bytes fail; content-addressable dedupe + never-overwrite; append-only interface usable by a downstream caller; multi-signal versioning on RAW hashes + Last-Amended + feed + instrument (banner is one signal; unchanged banner never suppresses); fail-closed transport + capture-time security.
The SOURCE-FIDELITY replay + HTML-vs-PDF-critical-conflict + all parser/render/extraction harnesses live in M3-T003 (they require parsing/rendering, which lives there).
LIVE-SOURCE SMOKE TESTS: separate from deterministic CI.
